Paul Writes Software All Pages

Now

07 April 2026 2 min read
Now

This is my now page.

It's where you'll see what I am currently doing with my life.

📆 Last updated: 21st April 2026

Living

The majority of my free time is spent enjoying life with my family - my partner, my son, and my two cats.

Building

I am writing a lot of software when I get the chance, usually during lunch hours.

I am actively building:

  • Paulblish for building this website.
  • atpcli for browsing and using at proto and bluesky in the CLI.
  • Clientele for creating API clients in Python.

I am maintaining and supporting:

  • PokeAPI - the Pokémon API.

Reading

I am trying to read 20 books this year.

I have currently read 5.

Reading is usually what I do the hour before I go to sleep.

Creating

I am being creative in two ways:

  • Running the Shoot Film Norwich photo club
    • We meet up regularly, and chat nearly every day.
    • We host monthly(ish) photo walks.
  • Learning to play the drums 🥁
    • I play when I get free time during the day.
    • I am taking weekly lessons.
    • I am close to grade 1.
      • I am not chasing grades, it's just a good indicator.
    • I started in November 2025.

Exercising

I am doing a decent amount of physical activity 🏃🚴

  • I ride my son to day care on our electric cargo bike about three times a week.
    • I run it on low power mode to make sure my body gets a work out.
  • I am trying to run again.
    • I have a long-term knee injury so I mostly do run/walk[1] intervals and never too far.
    • I hope to slowly train my knee back to full strength and run 5km+ each time.
  • I walk a lot, roughly 9,000 steps on average per day.

  1. AKA Jeffing ↩︎
